title: Pleuranthium adendrobium
taxonomy: Pleuranthium adendrobium is classified as a genus of orchids within the family Orchidaceae. It is native to East Asia and is known for its unique and delicate flowers. The species is part of the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is a large and diverse group of orchids. Pleuranthium adendrobium is also classified as part of the tribe Cranichideae, which includes a variety of terrestrial orchids. The exact classification of Pleuranthium adendrobium is still being studied and refined by botanists.
